# Collapsible

An interactive component that expands and collapses a panel.

## Installation

Add the Collapsible component from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/collapsible
```

## Usage

Use Collapsible for one optional region whose details can be hidden without losing the surrounding context. Place the control in `CollapsibleTrigger` and the conditional region in `CollapsibleContent`.

```vue
<template>
  <Collapsible
    v-model:open="isOpen"
    class="w-full max-w-sm space-y-2"
  >
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-4">
      <h4 class="text-sm font-semibold">
        @ragoniz starred 3 repositories
      </h4>
      <CollapsibleTrigger as-child>
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon-sm"
          aria-label="Toggle repositories"
        >
          <ChevronsUpDownIcon />
        </Button>
      </CollapsibleTrigger>
    </div>
    <div class="rounded-md border px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm">
      @radix-ui/primitives
    </div>
    <CollapsibleContent class="space-y-2">
      <div class="rounded-md border px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm">
        @radix-ui/colors
      </div>
      <div class="rounded-md border px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm">
        @stitches/react
      </div>
    </CollapsibleContent>
  </Collapsible>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button } from '@/Components/Button'
import {
  Collapsible,
  CollapsibleContent,
  CollapsibleTrigger,
} from '@/Components/Collapsible'
import { ChevronsUpDownIcon } from '@lucide/vue'
import { ref } from 'vue'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>
```

## Controlled state

Use `default-open` when the component can own its initial state. Bind `v-model:open` when the parent needs to observe or change the panel state. The root slot also exposes `open`, which is useful for changing a label or icon without duplicating the state.

## Accessibility and composition

The trigger primitive communicates its expanded state and relationship to the content. Give icon-only triggers an accessible name, and keep the trigger next to a visible label that explains what will be revealed. Content hidden in a collapsed panel should be optional rather than the only indication of an error or required next step.

`CollapsibleTrigger` accepts `as-child`. Its child must stay focusable and forward the attributes and events described in the [composition fundamentals](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/fundamentals/composition).

> **Use Accordion for several related sections: [Accordion](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/accordion)**
>
> Accordion supplies the heading and selection structure needed for a coordinated set of expandable sections. Collapsible is best for one independent region.

Hosted documentation: [Collapsible](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/collapsible)
